title: eriogonum tenellum subsp. ostlundii
intro: Eriogonum tenellum subsp. ostlundii, also known as a type of buckwheat or slender buckwheat, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and other minor health issues. The health benefits of Eriogonum tenellum subsp. ostlundii include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce swelling, and promote healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Eriogonum tenellum subsp. ostlundii include infusions, salves, and ointments, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
